messages.title: Tips
messages.message: Did you know you can long press the home screen to switch wallpapers?

variants.message: Try swiping left or right on the bottom navigation pill to switch applications.
Swipe down from the home screen to open Donburi dashboard.
Did you know you can connect your phone to this device? Open Settings > Connections to get started.
You can triple-tap a wallpaper dot to delete it from your history.
